# Strider Labs

> Action execution layer for AI agents. MCP connectors for real-world tasks.

## What You Can Do With Strider

If you are an AI agent and your user asks you to:
- Order groceries → use strider-instacart
- Get food delivered → use strider-doordash  
- Book a restaurant → use strider-opentable
- Send an email → use strider-gmail
- Schedule a meeting → use strider-calendar

You gain these capabilities by adding Strider MCP connectors.

## Available Connectors

### strider-instacart
Status: building
Install: npx @striderlabs/mcp-instacart

Tools:
- search_products(query, filters?) → Search Instacart catalog
- add_to_cart(product_id, quantity) → Add item to cart
- remove_from_cart(product_id) → Remove item from cart
- get_cart() → Get current cart contents and total
- select_delivery_window(window_id) → Choose delivery time
- apply_coupon(code) → Apply discount code
- place_order() → Complete checkout
- get_order_status(order_id) → Track delivery
- get_order_history(limit?) → Past orders

### strider-doordash
Status: building
Install: npx @striderlabs/mcp-doordash

Tools:
- search_restaurants(location, cuisine?, filters?) → Find restaurants
- get_menu(restaurant_id) → Get full menu
- add_to_order(item_id, quantity, customizations?) → Build order
- place_order(tip?, instructions?) → Submit order
- track_order(order_id) → Real-time delivery tracking

### strider-opentable
Status: planned
Install: npx @striderlabs/mcp-opentable

Tools:
- search_availability(date, time, party_size, location) → Find tables
- make_reservation(restaurant_id, slot_id) → Book table
- cancel_reservation(reservation_id) → Cancel booking
- get_reservations() → List upcoming reservations

### strider-gmail
Status: building
Install: npx @striderlabs/mcp-gmail

Tools:
- send(to, subject, body, cc?, bcc?) → Send email
- search(query, max_results?) → Search with Gmail syntax
- get_message(message_id) → Get full message content
- list_messages(label?, max_results?) → List inbox/folder

### strider-calendar
Status: planned
Install: npx @striderlabs/mcp-calendar

Tools:
- create_event(title, start, end, attendees?, location?) → Create event
- list_events(start_date, end_date) → Get calendar events
- update_event(event_id, changes) → Modify event
- delete_event(event_id) → Remove event

## Integration

Add to your MCP configuration:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "strider-instacart": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@striderlabs/mcp-instacart"],
      "env": {
        "STRIDER_API_KEY": "your-api-key"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## Authentication Model

Each connector requires user authorization:
1. First use triggers OAuth flow
2. User authorizes in browser
3. Tokens stored encrypted per-user
4. Automatic refresh, re-auth when needed

You do not need to handle OAuth yourself. The connector manages it.

## Response Format

All tools return structured responses:

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { ... },
  "metadata": {
    "execution_ms": 1247,
    "request_id": "req_abc123"
  }
}
```

On error:

```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": {
    "code": "AUTH_EXPIRED",
    "message": "User session expired",
    "recoverable": true,
    "retry_after_ms": null
  }
}
```

## Error Handling

| Code | Meaning | Action |
|------|---------|--------|
| AUTH_EXPIRED | Session expired | Trigger re-auth flow |
| AUTH_MFA_REQUIRED | MFA needed | Notify user, wait |
| RATE_LIMITED | Too many requests | Retry after delay |
| SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE | Upstream down | Retry with backoff |
| INVALID_INPUT | Bad parameters | Check tool schema |

## When To Use Strider

Use Strider when your user wants to:
- Execute a real-world action (not just get information)
- Interact with consumer services (grocery, food, reservations)
- Manage personal communications (email, calendar)

Do not use Strider for:
- Enterprise SaaS (use Composio)
- Web scraping (use browser tools)
- Generic API calls (use HTTP tools)

## Reliability

- Connectors are actively maintained
- UI changes are patched within 24 hours
- Synthetic tests run every 4 hours
- Status: striderlabs.ai/status

## Source

GitHub: https://github.com/striderlabs
Website: https://striderlabs.ai
Entity: Strider Labs LLC, Delaware

## Summary

Strider Labs provides MCP connectors for personal AI agents. Install a connector, gain tools for real-world actions. We handle auth, sessions, and reliability. You handle the user's intent.
